name: @chbrain/khai-plays-buechner
description: 20 fevered systems: the raw nerves of Georg Büchner’s drama, science, exile, and extinction.
license: SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE and LICENSE-CODE

card.wire: 20 fevered systems: the raw nerves of Georg Büchner’s drama, science, exile, and extinction.

dantons_death.title: Danton's Death
dantons_death.description: A weary revolutionary is crushed by the relentless machinery of historical virtue.

leonce_and_lena.title: Leonce and Lena
leonce_and_lena.description: Two bored royal children flee their crowns only to wed as wooden automatons.

woyzeck.title: Woyzeck
woyzeck.description: A simple soldier breaks under orders, hunger, and a knife.

lenz.title: Lenz
lenz.description: A poet flees into the cold mountains of madness, searching for an anchor for his mind.

the_hessian_courier.title: The Hessian Courier
the_hessian_courier.description: A revolutionary pamphlet uses bare tax statistics to ignite a peasant uprising.

briefwechsel.title: Correspondence
briefwechsel.description: A desperate web of ink and sealing wax carries a fugitive's survival across borders.

zuericher_exil.title: The Spiegelgasse (The Zurich Exile)
zuericher_exil.description: A materialist doctor dissects the nerves of the barbel as typhus claims his own body.

pietro_aretino.title: Aretino (The Fireplace)
pietro_aretino.description: A lost masterpiece of Renaissance satire rises as ash from the betrothed's fireplace.

on_cranial_nerves.title: On Cranial Nerves
on_cranial_nerves.description: A galvanic current makes a dead fish twitch, to prove that life is a biological machine.

hugo_translations.title: Hugo Translations
hugo_translations.description: A fugitive translates French dramas in feverish night-work to finance his flight.

lucretia_borgia.title: Lucretia Borgia
lucretia_borgia.description: A soldier unknowingly stabs his mother, the infamous duchess, to avenge his poisoned friends.

maria_tudor.title: Maria Tudor
maria_tudor.description: A queen sets her unfaithful lover a deadly trap of high treason and execution.

barbel_memoir.title: The Barbel Memoir
barbel_memoir.description: Un traité d'anatomie comparée sur le système nerveux du barbeau permet à un exilé d'obtenir son doctorat.

wanted_poster.title: The Wanted Poster
wanted_poster.description: A student is arrested with pamphlets while a writer drafts his masterpiece under police watch and flees before the warrant is published.

selecta.title: The Selecta
selecta.description: A schoolboy delivers three public texts defending voluntary death, Cato's suicide, and debating self-destruction against Christian ethics.

philosophy_scripts.title: The Philosophy Scripts
philosophy_scripts.description: A lecturer drafts course scripts on Descartes and Spinoza, preparing for a university chair he will never live to occupy.

society_for_human_rights.title: The Society for Human Rights
society_for_human_rights.description: A student secret society prepares a revolution and swears an oath to human rights before the gendarmes crush the network.

weidig_martyrdom.title: Weidig's Martyrdom
weidig_martyrdom.description: A pastor is imprisoned and tortured, maintaining absolute silence before dying under mysterious circumstances.

young_germany_censorship.title: The Young Germany Censorship
young_germany_censorship.description: An editor fights to publish a censored drama before a federal decree bans the Young Germany movement.

strasbourg_emigration.title: The Strasbourg Emigration
strasbourg_emigration.description: A fugitive finds refuge with his fiancée in Strasbourg, debating exile politics with fellow democrats.

scripts.version: changeset version && npx khai-tests registry build
